title: Summary proceedings
doc_html:
§192.  Summary proceedings

All suits brought by a surety under R.S. 42:190 shall be preference cases and shall be tried summarily without the intervention of a jury.
doc_text:
§192.  Summary proceedings
All suits brought by a surety under R.S. 42:190 shall be preference cases and shall be tried summarily without the intervention of a jury.
